assertions.description: The bus_analysis.i2c section reports the '+3.3V' net as an SCL line with 5 devices listed as U2 (the GL850G), all repeated. There is no SCL net or I2C label anywhere in the source schematic. The GL850G is a USB hub IC and has no I2C interface. The +3.3V net name appears to have triggered the SCL heuristic incorrectly.

The design has 5 USB differential pairs (U0+/U0- through U4+/U4-) connecting to the GL850G USB 2.0 hub IC. The differential_pairs section correctly identifies these as differential pairs, but classifies them with type='differential' rather than 'usb'. No USB interface detection appears in signal_analysis. The analyzer's USB detection heuristics apparently do not recognize the GL850G as a USB hub, and the U0+-style naming convention for USB ports on this hub is not matched by USB detection patterns.
